children.heading: Reports by creditor on obligor’s failure to pay amount regarded as billing error
children.label: a Reports by creditor on obligor’s failure to pay amount regarded as billing error
children.text: After receiving a notice from an obligor as provided in , a creditor or his agent may not directly or indirectly threaten to report to any person adversely on the obligor’s credit rating or credit standing because of the obligor’s failure to pay the amount indicated by the obligor under , and such amount may not be reported as delinquent to any third party until the creditor has met the requirements of and has allowed the obligor the same number of days (not less than ten) thereafter to make payment as is provided under the credit agreement with the obligor for the payment of undisputed amounts.section 1666(a) of this titlesection 1666(a)(2) of this titlesection 1666 of this title

children.heading: Reports by creditor on delinquent amounts in dispute; notification of obligor of parties notified of delinquency
children.label: b Reports by creditor on delinquent amounts in dispute; notification of obligor of parties notified of delinquency
children.text: If a creditor receives a further written notice from an obligor that an amount is still in dispute within the time allowed for payment under subsection (a) of this section, a creditor may not report to any third party that the amount of the obligor is delinquent because the obligor has failed to pay an amount which he has indicated under , unless the creditor also reports that the amount is in dispute and, at the same time, notifies the obligor of the name and address of each party to whom the creditor is reporting information concerning the delinquency.section 1666(a)(2) of this title

children.heading: Reports by creditor of subsequent resolution of delinquent amounts
children.label: c Reports by creditor of subsequent resolution of delinquent amounts
children.text: A creditor shall report any subsequent resolution of any delinquencies reported pursuant to subsection (b) to the parties to whom such delinquencies were initially reported.
